title: Water Resistant Match Stick Storage Container And Fire Starter Mirror
description:
This 3-in-1 Water Resistant Plastic Container acts as a match holder, fire started, and mirror. Pick one up today for your next camping adventure. This is a 3 in 1 plastic match box container with a watertight seal, a fire starter on the bottom, and a convenient mirror in the cover. It comes in a high visibility orange color, so you can easily find it when you set it down. These match stick containers are durable and are great for camping, hiking, hunting, or for carrying in your survival kit.
